series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative; i.e., does not attempt to influence agency policy.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years after the end of the calendar year in which created. ; Electronic: Retain two years after the end of the calendar year in which created., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
